title: Hierarchy of Core Data Types in Python
description: A flowchart categorizing the fundamental built-in data types in Python, showing their primary classifications and common examples used in data science.
relationships: Python Data Types are primarily categorized into Immutable (Numeric, String, Tuple, FrozenSet, Boolean, None, Bytes) and Mutable (List, Dictionary, Set, ByteArray) types, which is a fundamental concept for data manipulation and integrity in data science.
